nasb.text: and say to it, ‘Thus says the Lord God, “Behold, I am against you, Mount Seir, And I will stretch out My hand against you And make you a desolation and a waste.

esv.text: and say to it, Thus says the Lord God: Behold, I am against you, Mount Seir, and I will stretch out my hand against you, and I will make you a desolation and a waste.

cnv.text: 對它說：‘主耶和華這樣說：西珥山啊！我要與你為敵，伸手攻擊你，使你非常荒涼。

ccb.text: 告诉它，主耶和华这样说，‘西珥山啊，我要与你为敌，伸手攻击你，使你荒凉不堪。
